title: Newman and Cole 12" Wooden Broom Head with Stiff Bassine Natural Hard Bristle - Replacement Wooden Broom Head for Outdoor Garden Yard Brush Sweeping - Wood Brush Head Fitted Fixing Bracket Connector
features: Newman and Cole Outdoor Sweeping Brush Head - Stiff natural bassine bristles give a firm hard sweeping action and are suitable for use in wet or dry conditions. Making the broom perfect for use outdoors in gardens and on patios - The perfect garden yard sweeper broom
Traditional Wooden Broom Head - Featuring a wood stock with natural stiff bristles the brush is also fitted with a plastic bracket for easy fitting too a wooden broom handle

Sweep and Clean Up - The outdoor broom head is the ideal push broom to sweep up large areas such as driveways, paths, patios and other garden areas. The brush head is perfectly angled to give the best sweeping action.
The Perfect Replacement Wooden Broom Brush Head - 12" 300mm wide stiff outdoor broom head fitted with connector bracket for easy fixing to your broom handle.
Trusted Brand - Newman and Cole know what you want from a broom and aim to deliver exactly that!
description: Newman and Cole replacement wooden broom head with stiff natural bassine hard bristles. 12" wide (300mm) and perfect for sweeping and cleaning outdoor such as garden and yard areas. The hard bristle broom is heavy duty and hard wearing.
